name: Rattan Kids' Round Shelf Natural - Pillowfort™: Decorative Wall Shelf, Floating Curio Shelves, No Assembly Required
description: Add a little organization to your little one's room with this Rattan Round Shelf from Pillowfort™. Constructed from rattan for effortless style and warm texture, this decorative wall shelf features a round silhouette with shelves to add just the right touch of interest to their room decor. The natural finish complements a variety of decor aesthetics, and it features two shelves for displaying decorations or for storing small items to keep them neat and tidy.
